summary: Personal NQ workflow: local Tomac historical MTF data plus QQQ spot/options and VIX, with yfinance zero-config first and optional external runtime reuse.

data_contracts.label: Tomac cleaned multi-timeframe futures root
notes: Optional deeper drill-down uses 5m and 1m if available.

data_contracts.label: Paired ETF context
notes: Used for paired spot structure and context.

data_contracts.label: QQQ options Greeks / IV / OI
notes: The workflow expects explicit Greeks, implied volatility, and open interest when options enrichment is active.

data_contracts.label: Live analyze symbol bindings
notes: Futures uses NQ=F; spot and options use QQQ.

data_contracts.label: Kraken authenticated API credentials
notes: Use for authenticated kraken-cli workflows only.
The official kraken-cli auth surface uses the REST API key/secret pair; websocket key material remains external unless a later local integration needs it.

provider_tracks.label: Zero-config research companion data
notes: YFinance is the zero-config first choice for public research companion data.

provider_tracks.label: Options Greeks / IV / OI enrichment
notes: Required when the workflow wants explicit options enrichment rather than a public-HTTP fallback.

provider_tracks.label: Zero-config live analyze
notes: Use this first when the user wants the no-setup path.

provider_tracks.label: Operator-managed live runtime reuse
notes: Opt in only when the user explicitly wants an external or crypto-public runtime instead of the zero-config yfinance lane.

provider_tracks.label: IBKR local bridge reuse
notes: Opt in only when the user explicitly wants IBKR local access.

provider_tracks.label: Kraken CLI authenticated workflow
notes: Opt in only when the user explicitly wants Kraken CLI-backed workflows.
